feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Analytics Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP Analytics Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Calculated Totals in table & filter based dynamic calculations
entry.content:
Hello community,

I have a requirement where i need to show calculated values under a column as a total. Please refer the IMAGE, my calculations are like this: -

1. I get opening column data for each flock and age, i will need only my first age opening column value in each flock, then i will sum it up to get a value A.

2.Now i have a diff column for each age, i need to multiply the diff column value with my opening to get Cal1 values which i will sum to get B.

3.Now i will do A/B to get my data

     but here is my requirement, the diff i will multiply with the opening should change with my age filter, which means the diff column data will be based on what age i choose and accordingly it will get the values multiply and divide to show me the value in total.

Please tell me any workaround

entry.title: Exploring Seamless Planning via Free Trial SAP BDC
entry.content:
Hi,

I want to explore seamless planning via Free Trial version of SAP BDC.

1- When I try creating a planning model within SAC system provided as part of BDC Free Trial, the option is not available  ( grayed out) . I can only create an analytical model. See below

 

Is it because the free trial user has only BI license but not planning? I can't confirm this either as I don't have access to "users" section within SAC but looking at the tasks I can do in this sytem, it suggests it is a BI license.

2- I also want to try importing data from SAC DSP into SAC via OData ( that's the only option to consume actuals for planning purpose from DSP) but there seems no ODATa connection by default. I would create myself but I can't see OAuth Client ID etc in corresponding BDC DSP system either becuase the step 3 described in below screenshot is not accessible by free trial user in DSP system 

Just want to ensure if I am not missing anything .Security wise these steps might be demanding and not possible but it would be great to be able to explore seamless planning and data acquisition from DSP to SAC  via free trial versions as well. Is there a workaround ?

entry.title: Create Import(Acquire) Connection at SAC with source system SAP HANA Cloud
entry.content:
Hi Experts, 

I want to Create Import(Acquire) Connection at SAC with source system SAP HANA Cloud. 

How can I achieve ?

Regards

entry.title: Exploring SAP Analytics Cloud Learning Journey Not Available
entry.content:
Hi There

I am trying to open "Exploring SAP Analytics Cloud" Learning Journey, but It is not available

It is available in the Search Results, but there is no link to open the Learning Journey

Attached document contains the error details

entry.title: Issue Importing Customer Master Data with Multiple Combinations of Sales Area in SAC Model
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I'm currently working on a dimension in SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC) where I'm importing Customer Master Data from an SAP S/4HANA data source via a query.

Each customer  in the source system is mapped with multiple combinations of:

  • Sales Organization 

  • Distribution Channel 

  • Division 

This means the same Customer ID appears multiple times across different sales areas. However, while importing this data into SAC, I'm facing a validation issue during the import step — duplicate keys are not allowed because SAC expects a unique ID per master data row.

I'm attaching the screenshot as well explaining the problem.

 

What I Need Help With:

  • How can I structure the dimension so I can import all combinations of Customer + Sales Org + Dist. Channel + Division without violating SAC's unique key constraint?

entry.title: SAC Geo Maps with postal codes
entry.content:
Hello dear community,

I need your help creating a Geo Map in the SAC. I have an excel file, which is to be uploaded (example data, so I can show it to you) and it looks the following:

We have the ags (Amtlicher Gemeindeschlüssel), city, postal code (different districts within the city can have different postal codes), county and the federal state. I also added the longitude and latitude, but initially we wanted to use the areas and not the coordinates.

How can I configure the SAC model in a way, that I can investigate the # of cases in regard to the areas? I want to be able to drill down from the federal state all the way to the postal code. But I wasn't able to configure it that way, as I couldn't find a dimensions type like "postal code", only country, region and subregion or longitutde and latitude.  

I'm thankful for any help you can offer, thanks a lot! If you need more information to answer my request, just let me know.

Best regards,
Jan-Nicolas

entry.title: Report on calendar tasks
entry.content:
Hi,

There is a requirement to show the calendar tasks, assignees , viewers , start date, end date,current status and the information needs to be exported to excel.

Is there a way to export the calendar tasks information to excel.

Thanks,

entry.title: Page Navigation from one page to multiple pages in a story with filtered data in navigated page
entry.content:
Hii community,
I have a requirement where I need to provide navigation link from one page to multiple pages. Also, the context from that page should be driven to the navigated page too (data in navigated page should be filtered) .

For example: - If in page one I will click on dimension A then in my navigated pages I will get the data filtered for the same dimension A. 
Like this I can go to different pages with my data filtered accordingly.  Tell me if this possible and how. 
I have used the hyperlink but it's not filtering my navigated pages and also only one page can be navigated not Mutiple.

entry.title: How to monitor the data load in SAC when data is imported from Bigquery via dataproc
entry.content:
Hello all, I have the data imported from Big Query via dataproc into my model. Data from Bigquery is directly pushed into my model. When you check the data requests under 'data mangement' it is blank. Checked in system monitor, no activity is listed.

My question is how to monitor the data loaded from SAC. How to check if data is loaded in SAC model? 

Thank you,

Phani Varada

entry.title: SAC/Seamless Planning – Transactions Recorded at Higher Hierarchy Nodes
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I’ve created a planning model in SAC and successfully loaded the required master data from DSP through Seamless Planning. One dimension in the model is hierarchical.
When importing the transaction data, I noticed that some source entries are recorded only at higher-level hierarchy nodes (e.g., cost center) and not at the leaf level (e.g., individual postings). Consequently, these records are not imported into my model.

Have any of you encountered this issue before? How did you handle scenarios where data isn’t booked at the leaf level but needs to be correctly imported into the planning model?

entry.title: SAC Optimized Story Mode SortByValue Table
entry.content:
I am using a Checkboxgroup to adopted the Keyfigures in a Table (Material) AND a Chart (Branche). This works fine in Optimized Story Mode.

Now I want to sort the Values in the Chart and in the Table dynamically. 

The Code for the Chart (Branche) works fine. 

selectedMeasure = CheckboxGroup_Measures_2.getSelectedKey();
Branche.sortByValue(selectedMeasure,SortOrder.Ascending);

but the Code for the Table "Material" doesn't work. 

Material.sortByValue(selectedMeasure,SortOrder.Ascending);

Has anybody an idea how to adopt the Code? 
Many thanks and regards 🙏

entry.title: Sap Analytics Cloud - Security for an end user to be able to upload data using an upload job
entry.content:
Hello, 

I'm having issues configuring the role for the end user to be able to upload data to the Planning Model through an upload job. 

I have the user with the Modeler role and the next things on: 

he following permissions are required to import data into a model:

  • Create permission on either Analytic Model or Planning Model.
  • Execute permission on Personal Data Acquisition.
    => Without this permission, you cannot choose option "Import a file from your computer" to create a new model.
  • Create and Read permissions on Connection.
    => Without the two permission, you will get error message "The upload failed due to an unexpected internal server error. Please try again later. If the problem persists, please contact your system administrator" when uploading file.
  • Create permission on Dimension.
    => Without this permission, you will get error message like "Model <dimension name> creation has failed. <...> "error":"You are not authorized to Create Dimension <dimension name>."" when creating model.
  • Users also need the Read and Maintain model permissions to upload/change data for existing models. See Model and Version Security and Model Administration Scenarios.
  • Users need permissions in two places in order to perform actions on a model: they need the general application permission (via role) to Read, Update, Delete, or Maintain analytic or planning models, and they also need the Read, Update, Delete, or Maintain permission granted via the Sharing Settings directly on the model itself.

But the upload job is still rejecting all the data due to data access control.

I also have the users in the read and write dimmension: Audti trail, business area and company. Dimmensions that in my model have security on. 

Any ideas what can be happening? 

 

Thank you.

entry.title: SAP SAC excel table formate based on propery values
entry.content:
Hi ,

Based latest realse on SAC excel addin futures , I tried cell styles and table formate options and unable to get desired results . please share some inputs on below 

1. How to formate based on dimension propery valsues 

2. How to formate based only base memebrs dyanmically 

Thanks,

Chanti .

entry.title: Unable to Find "SAP Analytics Cloud" under Service MarketPlace at BTP trail Account
entry.content:
Hi Experts,
I am unable to Find "SAP Analytics Cloud" under Service MarketPlace at BTP trail Account.
How can I add "SAP Analytics Cloud" ?

Regards

Vijay

entry.title: Issue with Posting Supplier Invoice in MIRO – Line Item Limit Exceeded
entry.content:
Hi SAP Team,

We are currently facing an issue while trying to post a supplier invoice using transaction MIRO. The number of line items exceeds the limit of 999, which is preventing us from posting the invoice.

Kindly advise on how to proceed or suggest any possible workarounds.

Thank you for your support.

Vignesh K

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Sourcing and Procurement

entry.title: how to transition SAC on BW/4HANA to SAC on BDC
entry.content:
Dear Expert,

My customer use SAC on BW /4HANA and have plan go to use BDC. What should customer to prepare about SAC on BDC??? rebuild , reconnect or have tools to transition.

Thank you.

Best Regards,

Supatchj.

entry.title: Overwrite dimension filters in SAC Excel Add-in table based on property of dimension
entry.content:
Hi All,

Currently I am facing issue override dimensions members based on filter value.

Ex:  I have product dimension and plant is attribute. User will select plant as selection from (SAP.GETDIMENSIONFILTER), based on this plant, products need to display in row axis. I am using below function with syntax and giving #VALUE error. =SAP.OVERWRITEDIMENSIONFILTER("Table1","D_Product","Plant=&F11",0,0). cell F11 has plant value came from plant selection using SAP.GETDIMENSIONFILTER function .... Please advise any inputs.

Thanks,

Chanti

entry.title: I want to create a button that will sort a dimension in a table by the highest to lowest value
entry.content:
I want to create a button that will sort a dimension in a table by the highest to lowest value. In my table i have a date dimension in the column.

Table_1.sortByValue({[Alias.MeasureDimension]:"00O2TM15XD8XM22WI2SLFCF89"},SortOrder.Descending,Direction.Vertical);

I have used the above script and this has worked in the past - but now is not working - i am gettin the message " Sort is removed because it no longer valide"    (not to sure if its something to do with the date dimension). 

Can anyone help with this?

 

@Lothar_Kder  @N1kh1l - do you have any idea on this? I know you have helped me in the past.

 

Thanks 

 

Peers

entry.title: Multiaction to import data into analytic data models in SAC in a sequence
entry.content:
Hi,

I have created a multiaction in SAC that carries out data imports to data models (analytic). For instance, if I have 3 data models, then step 1 of the multiaction should do data refresh for model A, step 2 of the multiaction should do data refresh for model B and so on. There is a step in the multiaction feature called 'Data Import Step' that can be used to execute a data import job. Please see the screenshot.

On scheduling this multiaction in the calendar of SAC, though the schedule does its job i.e., carry out import jobs in a sequence, when there is a failure of a particular step (or import job), the rest of the jobs/steps are not executed. A step is dependent on the previous step for its execution. Is there a way to overcome this limitation and have the multiaction task run the steps independently?. 

Please let me know.

 

Regards,

entry.title: Issue: SAC story is not visible in SAP Build Workzone - - Content Security Policy Issue on Trial Acc
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

I’m using an SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC) trial account and have created a story that I want to embed in SAP Work Zone.

However, when I click on the Work Zone tile, the SAC tenant refuses to connect. In the browser console, I see the following error:

Error: *"Refused to frame '<SAC Tenant URL>' because an ancestor violates the following Content Security Policy directive: "frame-ancestors "."

SAP documentation suggests the following resolution:

Go to: Main Menu > System > Administration > App Integration,
and add your origin under the Trusted Origins section.

But the issue is — this App Integration section doesn’t appear to be available in the SAC trial account.

Has anyone faced this issue before? Is there a workaround or any way to allow embedding from a trial SAC account?

Any help would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you!

SAP Analytics Cloud  SAP Build Work Zone, advanced edition
